name: rbac-system-monorepo
description: Monorepo for User Management & Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) System

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,AUTH-SVC,USER-SVC,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgCyan" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:frontend"
